name: Sega Saturn
description: Sega's 32-bit home console platform, known for arcade ports, 2D fighters, shooters, Sega first-party experiments, and a strong Japanese library.

eras.title: Arcade 3D Era
eras.description: Early period focused on Sega arcade conversions, Virtua Fighter, racing games, and the 32-bit transition.

eras.title: Japanese Library Era
eras.description: Late period defined by Japanese exclusives, 2D fighters, shooters, RPGs, and cult releases.
